Big Issue Group Impact Advisory

Follow us

We support businesses to deliver Impact and achieve sustainability

About Us

Big Issue Group Impact Advisory helps corporate clients and partners to enhance their ESG & Sustainability thinking, capabilities and go-to-market strategies. We harness our impact DNA, built on three decades of experience, to help our clients and partners achieve their ambitions and make a difference.

We support clients to:

  • Solve the complex challenges inherent in ESG & Sustainability
  • Identify, capture and measure the ‘S’ in ESG
  • Deliver credible, multi-stakeholder impact solutions that align with broader business strategy
  • Translate our approach into award-winning reporting and communications

Our corporate services include:

  • Strategy development
  • Commitment setting and prioritisation
  • Research and analysis
  • Stakeholder Engagement
  • Mapping to Sustainable Development Goals and other key initiatives
  • Programmatic and roadmap development
  • Impact verification and confirmation
  • Award winning reporting and communications

We collaborate with companies across industries, fostering their sustainability ambitions and guiding them through transformative journeys. Whether offering comprehensive end-to-end support or focusing on specific objectives and requirements, our efforts align with best-in-class industry thinking. Through a group of industry experts, and a team that boasts extensive experience across sustainability, investment, impact, and communications, we can assist you in addressing the diverse needs of multiple stakeholders and deliver measurable progress towards goals and commitments. Additionally, we are able to draw on our Advisory Group of industry leading experts to help us deliver best-in-class solutions.

If you need help with a sustainability or impact challenge or wish to learn more about our services, then get in touch via email – impactadvisory@bigissue.com

Impact Reports

CT UK Impact Report

CT UK Impact Report

Colombia Threadneedle Investments manages the Fund, and Big Issue Group acts as a social advisor.

Group Services

Championing positive solutions to ending poverty

Championing positive solutions to ending poverty

Our award-winning journalism and campaigning that champions positive solutions to end poverty in the UK. Our journalism is delivered through our weekly magazine, website and app.
DISCOVER
Investing in organisations that work to end poverty and inequality

Investing in organisations that work to end poverty and inequality

We facilitate investment into other social enterprises, social-purpose businesses and charities working to end poverty and inequality in the UK.
DISCOVER
Working with employers to support people into jobs

Working with employers to support people into jobs

Big Issue Recruit is our specialist recruitment service, that works with employers to support people affected by poverty and facing barriers to work to move into sustainable employment.
DISCOVER
Working with organisations to create better social outcomes

Working with organisations to create better social outcomes

Big Issue Group Impact Advisory helps corporate clients and partners to enhance their ESG & Sustainability thinking, capabilities and go-to-market strategies.
DISCOVER
Working to end poverty

Working to end poverty

We make sustainable shopping a truly accessible option. Every brand we feature puts people and the planet first, to give you the power to make a positive difference with every purchase you make.
